name: Modern Horizons

draft.notes: Pack includes a basic snow land plus an art card (separate from the ad/token card). New US format: ad/token + art card + land + rare + 3 uncommons + 10 commons. Foil (if present) appears before the rare, displacing a common. Common foils appear ~1 in 8 packs; uncommon/rare foil rates not exact.

statedRates: Foil 1:67 cards. Common foils ~1 in 8 packs.
sourceNotes: Large supplemental set. Pack contains an extra art card AND a token/ad card. Includes five basic snow lands (one in each pack). Printed USA (two formats: classic and 'new'; 'new' is more common) and Belgium. 36 packs per box. Modeled on the 'new' US 15-card draft format.
